# 🏥 Healthcare Analytics Dashboard

## 📌 Project Overview

The Healthcare Analytics Dashboard is an end-to-end Power BI project designed to analyze hospital performance using a dataset containing 50,000 patient records. The objective of this project is to transform raw healthcare data into actionable insights that support better decision-making, improve patient outcomes, and optimize operational efficiency.

This dashboard focuses on key healthcare metrics such as patient satisfaction, treatment costs, readmission rates, and doctor performance.

---

## 🎯 Business Objective

Healthcare organizations generate large volumes of patient data every day. Hospital management requires data-driven insights to:

- Improve patient satisfaction
- Reduce hospital readmission rates
- Monitor treatment costs
- Evaluate doctor performance
- Enhance operational efficiency
- Support strategic decision-making

---

## 📊 Dataset Information

**Dataset Type:** Synthetic Healthcare Dataset

**Total Records:** 50,000

### Key Attributes

- Patient ID
- Age
- Gender
- Department
- Doctor
- Disease
- Admission Date
- Discharge Date
- Treatment Cost
- Satisfaction Score
- Readmitted Status
- Insurance Coverage

---

## 🛠 Tools & Technologies Used

- Power BI
- Power Query
- DAX (Data Analysis Expressions)
- Data Modeling
- Data Visualization
- KPI Analysis

---

## 📈 Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

| KPI | Value |
|------|------|
| Total Patients | 50,000 |
| Average Satisfaction Score | 3.00 / 5 |
| Readmission Rate | 18.07% |
| Total Treatment Cost | ₹5 Billion |

---

# 📑 Dashboard Pages

## 1️⃣ Executive Overview

Provides a high-level summary of hospital performance.

### Visuals
- KPI Cards
- Patient Admission Trend
- Department Distribution
- Gender Distribution
- Insurance Distribution

---

## 2️⃣ Patient Satisfaction Analysis

Analyzes factors influencing patient satisfaction.

### Visuals
- Satisfaction by Department
- Satisfaction by Doctor
- Satisfaction vs Length of Stay
- Satisfaction by Insurance

---

## 3️⃣ Cost & Readmission Analysis

Evaluates treatment costs and patient readmission patterns.

### Visuals
- Cost by Department
- Average Cost by Disease
- Readmission Rate by Department
- Satisfaction vs Readmission

---

## 4️⃣ Doctor Performance Dashboard

Measures doctor performance using multiple healthcare metrics.

### Visuals
- Doctor Workload Analysis
- Average Treatment Cost by Doctor
- Readmission Rate by Doctor
- Patient Satisfaction by Doctor
- Cost vs Satisfaction Analysis

---

## 5️⃣ Executive Summary & Recommendations

Provides management-focused insights and recommendations.

### Includes
- Key Findings
- Business Problems
- Recommendations
- Expected Business Impact

---

# 🔍 Key Findings

- Analyzed 50,000 patient records.
- Average patient satisfaction score is 3.0/5.
- Readmission rate is 18.07%.
- Readmitted patients generally report lower satisfaction.
- Treatment costs vary across diseases and departments.
- Doctor performance differs across satisfaction and readmission metrics.

---

# 💡 Recommendations

- Improve discharge planning to reduce readmission rates.
- Monitor departments with higher readmission rates.
- Review high-cost treatment categories.
- Implement regular doctor performance reviews.
- Strengthen patient feedback collection processes.

---

# 📈 Expected Business Impact

- Higher Patient Satisfaction
- Lower Readmission Rates
- Better Cost Management
- Improved Healthcare Quality
- Enhanced Operational Efficiency
- Data-Driven Decision Making

---
